# Vendored external documents

This directory holds third-party reference material. It does not define Vexcalibur policy.

## Google Python Style Guide

- File: <a href="google-python-style-guide.md">google-python-style-guide.md</a>
- Source: <https://github.com/google/styleguide/blob/gh-pages/pyguide.md>
- Current source branch snapshot: `google/styleguide@1809c769de31ba388c755ad15dd057a9ba8531fd`
- Fetched on: 2026-06-23
- License: Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 Unported; see the upstream [license](https://github.com/google/styleguide/blob/gh-pages/LICENSE) and [CC BY 3.0 terms](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/legalcode)

The sync workflow removes trailing whitespace and repairs a few upstream-local links. The text otherwise remains upstream material under its own license. Vexcalibur remains Apache-2.0 licensed.

Follow the [local Python style policy](../development/python-style.md) when the guide and this repository differ.
